title: Lush Italian Beef Casserole
description: A hearty Italian beef casserole with rich tomato gravy and aromatic herbs. Melted mozzarella and parmesan crown the dish, perfect for festive gatherings.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high and brown beef cubes in batches, then set aside.
Add diced onion to the pot and cook until translucent.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
Deglaze the pan with red wine, scraping up all browned bits.
Add beef broth, tomato sauce, dried oregano, dried basil, and red pepper flakes, bringing the mixture to a simmer.
Return the browned beef to the pot, cover with a lid, and bake in the preheated oven for 90 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven, stir in shredded mozzarella and grated parmesan until melted and creamy.
If desired, sprinkle chopped fresh parsley on top before serving.
Serve hot, optionally with toasted breadcrumbs or crusty bread on the side.
